name: auth-learning-system
description: Complete Authentication Learning System — Zero to Staff Engineer

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @auth/shared build && concurrently --names "shared,api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,blue" "pnpm --filter @auth/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @auth/api dev" "pnpm --filter @auth/web dev"
scripts.dev:solution: pnpm --filter @auth/shared build && concurrently --names "shared,sol-api,sol-web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "pnpm --filter @auth/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @solution/api dev" "pnpm --filter @solution/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @auth/shared build && pnpm --filter @auth/api build && pnpm --filter @auth/web build
